description: Maps visual slide-step index to narration/audio page index for BoundWaveIntroSlides. This is a section-by-section semantic alignment from settled-frame diagnostics, not a global shift.
notes: Repeated narration indices are intentional where several short visual reveals share one narration page; the renderer groups consecutive repeats so the WAV plays only once.
Some narration pages are skipped because the current visual deck does not have a settled state that cleanly matches them.
After changing next_slide pauses or narration wording, regenerate diagnostics and update this map before full MP4 rendering.
